name: Bourbon Nut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour with baking powder and nutmeg.
2. Cream butter well, then gradually add sugar and continue to cream until fluffy.
3. Beat in eggs, one at a time.
4. Add sifted dry ingredients alternately with bourbon.
5. Stir in nuts, raisins, and cherries.
6. Turn batter into a well-greased 10-inch tube pan lined on bottom with waxed paper.
7. Bake at 300°F for 2 hours, or until cake tester inserted near the center comes out clean. If the top of the cake begins to brown before it is done, cover loosely with foil.
8. Remove cake from oven and let stand 10 to 15 minutes, then turn out onto a rack to cool completely.
9. When cool, sprinkle with additional bourbon and wrap. Use more bourbon if a fragrant cake is desired. Let the cake mellow for 1 week or longer for best flavor. Sift powdered sugar over top before slicing.
